## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential fit for Ryan McCready as a Growth Lead at GrowthX, discussing company vision, role expectations, and Ryan's background.](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an AI-powered growth agency, with plans to develop products from their internal workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Ryan has diverse marketing experience, from content creation to growth marketing, and is interested in early-stage startup challenges](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Both parties are aligned on the importance of combining AI tools with human expertise in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [The role would involve a mix of growing GrowthX and potentially working with some clients for insights](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Vision

  - [GrowthX is a "new age growth agency for the age of AI"](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Currently focused on content marketing and SEO for clients](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Building internal AI+expert systems for higher efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Long-term vision: develop products from agency workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Exploring new services like social ghostwriting and link building](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Ryan's Background and Experience

  - [Diverse marketing roles across startups (BenGage, Foundation, Reforge, Whimsical)](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Strong content creation and thought leadership experience](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Developed "plug-and-play" marketing skills across various disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Recent experience with AI integration and product marketing at Whimsical](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

### AI in Marketing Discussion

  - [Both see potential in combining AI tools with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Discussed challenges of current AI writing tools (e.g., AeroFS)](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Explored ideas for improving efficiency in content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Agreed on the importance of human oversight in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Potential Role and Projects at GrowthX

  - [Focus on growing GrowthX itself (75%) with some client work (25%)](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Possible involvement in developing new work streams and products](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Opportunity to work on "zero to one" projects (e.g., new publication, micro-apps)](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Emphasis on messaging and positioning for new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

## Next Steps

  - Ryan to have a conversation with Bridget (leads Ops) later this week
  - Potential follow-up exercise and panel discussion next week
  - [If proceeding, aim to complete interview process within two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)
  - [Ryan targeting a potential June 1st start date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/wMzVphytFZvR9qt46UeCza7FjBMC1QFw?tab=summary&timestamp=2812.0)
